name: Château de Chillon
description: Switzerland's most visited castle, a medieval fortress on the shores of Lake Geneva.
longDescription: Château de Chillon is a fairy-tale castle sitting on a rocky island on the shores of Lake Geneva near Montreux. Dating back to the 12th century, this medieval fortress features 25 buildings and 3 courtyards. Explore the underground vaults, grand halls, and towers with panoramic lake views. The castle inspired Lord Byron's poem 'The Prisoner of Chillon'.
